headline: North American construction heavyweights from STO and Énska join Buildots advisory board
summary: Buildots, the global construction intelligence platform, today announced the appointment of major North American construction industry leaders to its advisory board. The new additions are Greg Dunkle, COO of STO Building Group and Tim Coldwell, CEO of Énska and former President of Chandos.
